data.title: Czech Republic construction industry set to grow by 5.1% in 2025 after 1.8% growth in 2024; report predicts trends till 2029.
data.description: A recent report on the construction market in the Czech Republic, available through ResearchAndMarkets.com, projects a 5.1% real terms growth in 2025. The sector experienced a 1.8% growth in 2024. The analysis covers various segments including commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets up to 2029. The growth in 2025 is fueled by investments in hospitality and transportation sectors.

data.title: 1,000+ women-led businesses to get funding in IYBA-WE4A Programme. EU, OACPS, BMZ, GIZ, TEF empower African women.
data.description: Global leaders in development, including the EU, OACPS, BMZ, GIZ, and TEF, have announced an expanded collaboration to empower African women for a sustainable future. This initiative was disclosed in Lagos, Nigeria, on December 24, 2025. The partnership aims to support women in Africa and enhance their participation in sustainable development efforts. This joint effort signifies a significant step towards addressing gender equality and promoting economic empowerment, with specific focus on enhancing opportunities for women in key sectors such as education, entrepreneurship, and leadership. The partnership, which involves contributions from multiple entities, underscores a commitment to creating positive change and fostering inclusive growth on the continent.

data.title: Picard Medical secures up to $50 million in debt financing for total artificial heart. Sole Agent: WestPark Capital Inc.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, Picard Medical, Inc. disclosed a significant development. The parent company of SynCardia Systems LLC, known for producing the world's inaugural total artificial heart endorsed by both the U.S. FDA and Health Canada, revealed their definitive pact for a private placement funding. This agreement encompasses a total of $50.0 million in senior secured notes due 2028, accompanied by warrants for acquiring common stock of the company. WestPark Capital Inc. played the role of Sole Placement Agent in this transaction.

data.title: Westhaven Gold Corp. presents 400,000 incentive stock options at CDN$0.25 per share to an Officer, totaling 16.8M outstanding.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on December 24, 2025, Westhaven Gold Corp. (TSX-V: WHN) disclosed the granting of 400,000 incentive stock options to an Officer as per the Company's Stock Option Plan. These options are priced at CDN$0.25 per share and are valid for exercise until December 23, 2030. With this recent grant, the total number of outstanding stock options has risen to 16,805,000, which accounts for 6.9% of the Company’s common shares currently in circulation.

data.title: New Zealand construction industry to contract by 3.3% in 2025 due to rising debt, labor shortage, and increasing costs.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "New Zealand Construction Market Size, Trends, and Forecasts by Sector" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The New Zealand construction industry is projected to decrease by 3.3% in real terms in 2025 due to various factors such as escalating debt, decline in building permits, scarcity of labor, and a rise in construction material expenses. Key sectors analyzed in the report include commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets. The analysis extends up to 2029 and highlights critical insights on the industry's trends and forecasts.

data.title: Play For Dream Technology showcasing flagship Play For Dream MR headset at CES 2026 in Las Vegas from Jan 6 to 9 at Booth #14041.
data.description: A tech company, Play For Dream Technology, will showcase its groundbreaking Android-based spatial computer at CES 2026 in Las Vegas from January 6 to 9 at Central Hall, Booth #14041. Their flagship Play For Dream MR headset will also be unveiled at the event.

data.title: Phoenix Tower Intl acquires around 3,700 sites from Bouygues Telecom and SFR in joint venture deal.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, in Boca Raton, Florida, Phoenix Tower International (PTI) confirmed the completion of the acquisition of Infracos. Infracos, a joint venture between Bouygues Telecom and SFR, oversees around 3,700 wireless sites in medium-sized locations.

data.title: Jeffs' Brands transitioning to homeland security with Scanary Ltd, AI radar for threat detection without disrupting flow.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, in Tel Aviv, Israel, Jeffs' Brands Ltd. (Nasdaq: JFBR) shared updates on Scanary Ltd., an Israeli deep-tech startup, and its revolutionary AI-powered radar system set to revolutionize concealed threat detection. The innovative technology aims to enhance security measures without impeding the movement of individuals. With rising security concerns such as mass shootings and terrorist activities in public areas, traditional screening methods have proven insufficient. Lengthy queues at metal detectors and X-ray scanners not only cause congestion and frustration but also create weak points through which threats can slip unnoticed. Scanary Ltd.'s advanced radar system offers a solution by utilizing artificial intelligence to identify concealed dangers while ensuring a seamless flow of people.
